title: Saturday Killer
original_title: มือปืนดาวพระเสาร์
overview: Tee Rifle is an assassin with an impotence problem. He crashes into a beautiful woman Chris and falls in love. Chris knows Tee Rifle as Mark, but what they don't know is that Tee is the assassin that killed her father, the man she's out kill.
